meta.description: Game-based learning dataset from the Kaggle 'Predict Student Performance from Game Play' competition based on the Jo Wilder educational game.

summary.note: Limited academic citation traction to date. One possible Scholar false positive (Spanish student project may reference a different Kaggle dataset). Kaggle download counts serve as the primary impact metric.

papers.title: Diversified Ensembling: An Experiment in Crowdsourced Machine Learning
papers.use_of_dataset: Unclear — likely methodological reference; no direct mention of this dataset
papers.key_takeaway: Focuses on diversified ensembling via Kaggle-style competition; citation appears peripheral if present at all.

papers.title: Untitled student project (Spanish)
papers.use_of_dataset: References the associated Kaggle competition (Franklin et al. 2023) directly; likely a legitimate citation of the competition dataset
papers.key_takeaway: Student built a performance prediction model using the Kaggle competition data. Low academic weight but confirms dataset discoverability beyond English-language research communities.
